content: We can adapt coordinate-wise normalization to stabilize intrinsic reward scaling for ICM curiosity mechanisms in 2025 autonomous agents by normalizing each feature dimension of the ICM's learned state embedding independently, rather than applying global normalization to the entire embedding space. This prevents dominant novelty signals from high-variance state features (like large raw position coordinates) from crowding out weaker but meaningful novelty signals from low-variance features (like subtle interaction changes), leading to more balanced exploration across all aspects of the environment.
